name: WLF_RECOM_CONTEXT
description: This table stores the recommendation context information.

columns.Name: RECOM_CONTEXT_ID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier.

columns.Name: RECOMMENDATION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to WLF_RECOMMENDATIONS

columns.Name: CONTEXT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Specifies the context type

columns.Name: PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for the talent profile

columns.Name: PROFILE_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Specifies talent profile type

columns.Name: CONTENT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HRT_CONTENT_TYPES_B

columns.Name: CONTENT_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HRT_CONTENT_ITEMS_B

columns.Name: CONTENT_ITEM_TEXT
columns.Comments: Specifies content item text value of type free-form text

columns.Name: MANAGER_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for the manager

columns.Name: WORK_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for the work assignment

columns.Name: DEST_CRITERIA_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for the destination criteria

columns.Name: DEST_CRITERIA_TYPE
columns.Comments: Specifies the destination criteria type

columns.Name: IS_CURATED_ROLE_SKILL
columns.Comments: Specifies if the role skill is curated or not

columns.Name: IS_CURATED_RESOURCE_SKILL
columns.Comments: Specifies if the resource skill is curated or not

columns.Name: RESOURCE_MATCHING_CRITERIA
columns.Comments: Specifies the criteria for recommending resources

columns.Name: IS_REQ_ROLE_CONTENT_ITEM
columns.Comments: Specifies if the content item is marked as required in the role profile

columns.Name: IS_RESOURCE_WITH_OUTCOME
columns.Comments: Specifies if the resource is defined with the content item as an outcome

columns.Name: ESS_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for the ESS Job populating the recommendation context

columns.Name: SYNONYM_CONTENT_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HRT_CONTENT_TYPES_B

columns.Name: SYNONYM_CONTENT_ITEM_TEXT
columns.Comments: Specifies content item text value of type free-form text

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
